<a id="experimentation-agent-methods"></a>
# ⚙️ Experimentation & Agent Methods

> Systems, methods, and specialized agents whose main contribution is iterative experimentation, optimization, search, reflection, or self-improving execution, rather than a full end-to-end research workflow.

## What belongs here

- the main contribution is an experiment-improve loop, optimization method, search method, reflection/memory/tool-use method, or a specialized agent centered on iterative improvement

## Exclude if

- the main contribution is a full or near-full research workflow
- the main contribution is infrastructure, runtime, or platform tooling
- the main contribution is benchmarking or evaluation
